text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Whoaaaa! What's with this huge downpour?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Wow, it's basically flooding! I can't even see the
track! If this keeps up, today's training is gonna
be...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Oh NOOO! And today I was thinking of running
with Taishin too!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What? I don't remember you asking me.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Trainer! Can't you make the clouds go away?
choice_data_list: That's... out of my pay grade.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: But at this rate, I can't run with Taishiiin!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Like I said, you never—ugh, whatever...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Besides, no one can change the weather. It's
never gonna happen.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Really? Are you sure?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Ticket looks over my way with hope in her eyes.
choice_data_list:
We could make some sunshine dolls to pray for
sunny weather.
Let's wait and see what happens.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: That's a great idea! Taishin, come join us!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Sunshine dolls? What are you, a little kid? I'm not
doing that.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Why not? It's fun! At least watch me make one!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Oh, come on...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Let's see. We'll need a white handkerchief and
something to fill it up with... Trainer, do you have
stuff in your office? Let's go look!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Look at this, Trainer! I made so many sunshine
dolls!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A whole pile of them is sitting on my desk.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I figured if I'm putting up one, I might as well
make a whole bunch. Maybe it'll work faster that
way!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, the sight of all those dolls in one place is
kinda creeping me out...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: How did you not get sick of making them?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Get sick of it? As long as I've got materials, I
could make them forever!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Good idea, me! I'm gonna keep making more until
it's sunny!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just then, a ray of sunlight shines in through the
window, as bright and clear as if there was never
a cloud in the sky.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
WOW! It got sunny! All the sunshine dolls I made
really worked!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
You're giving them credit for this? You didn't
even hang them up yet.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Looking around at the huge pile of dolls, I can't
help but feel like Winning Ticket's perseverance
truly did save the day.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A little while later...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Yaaay! It stopped! The rain is GONE!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
But the track's still a muddy mess. I don't think
we're out of the woods just yet—

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna go do some light jogging!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ugh, she's not listening to a word I say.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Taishiiin! Trainer! I'm back!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
It's still pretty muddy, but if you think of it as a
soft dirt track, it's nothing I can't handle!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
It could actually work as great training for
controlling our balance while running!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Yeah? You think so too? Okay, Taishin, that
settles it!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Go get changed so we can run!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
How many times do I have to say this? I never
said I'd run with you today!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Whaaat? No way!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Yes way!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: For real?! THIS IS HORRIBLE!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Uerghhh! I was really looking forward to it too!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I really wanted... sniff... to run together...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Gah! You're so annoying! Stop crying!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... Then... will you join me?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Why would I—ugh, turning you down is just
getting exhausting at this point.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I'm still not joining you today, but... let's do it
sometime soon, okay?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Really?! Yaaaay!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Yay, yay, yay! It's a promise!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: All right! I gotta get faster before we run then!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...You're such a dummy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, Narita Taishin and I continue watching
Ticket train.
